name: Heap Synthesis — Meeting Rooms, Sliding Window, Design

metadata.career_relevance: Meeting Rooms II (interval scheduling) is asked at every FAANG company. Sliding Window Median combines sliding window (M30) with two heaps. These synthesis problems test ability to combine multiple patterns.

hook.what_you_will_build: Heap Synthesis — Meeting Rooms, Sliding Window, Design

key_takeaways: Meeting Rooms II: sort by start; min-heap of end times; count max simultaneous
Car Pooling: sort by pickup time; min-heap of (dropoff, seats); release when passed
IPO: two heaps — max-heap of profits unlocked by capital; min-heap of projects by capital
Sliding Window Median: two heaps + lazy deletion with HashMap
Design Twitter: PriorityQueue for top-10 feed merge; HashMap for follows/tweets
reflection.next_topic_preview: Module 36 complete! Next: M37 DSA9 — Graphs.
